name: Data Platform
scope_implemented: Canonical data schema + config: configs/data.yaml (symbols, timeframes, required series, fixed as_of coverage window, validation thresholds) and src/data/schema.py (SeriesKey, per-data_type row schemas, regular-grid math).

Ingestion for OHLCV (all timeframes 1m/5m/1h), mark price, index price, funding, open interest, and spread snapshots via a DataSource interface; Phase 2 source is an OFFLINE deterministic generator (pure function of ts -> reproducible, range-independent) behind the same interface the ccxt source will use later (src/data/source.py).

Parquet series store (src/data/store.py): month-partitioned per Appendix B.5 keys (exchange/data_type/symbol/timeframe/year/month), append-only, deduplicated by grid timestamp, ordered, content-checksummed; large history lives in the data lake, not Postgres (Appendix B.4).

Historical downloader + incremental updater + automatic gap detection and backfill (src/data/ingest.py, src/data/gaps.py); scripts/backfill CLI (DATA-COV remediation: --symbol/--series/--from), idempotent.

Data-quality validation (src/data/validation.py, Section 23): missing/duplicate/out-of-order/future timestamps, impossible prices, extreme gaps, funding-grid alignment, mark/index/perp alignment, abnormal spread, clock drift -> DataQualityReport.

Immutable versioned dataset snapshots with manifests (src/data/snapshot.py, Appendix B.5): deterministic snapshot id from window+content; manifest records symbols/time range/data types/row counts/missing ranges/validation status/source jobs + per-series checksums.
Relational index: dataset_versions and data_quality_reports tables + Alembic migration 0002 (idempotent via create_all checkfirst).

Data-platform orchestrator (src/data/platform.py): ensure_coverage (safe gap repair) -> validate -> snapshot -> persist report; data-validation report generated before runs and stored on disk + DB (Section 34).

First-class data jobs (Appendix B.7): download_ohlcv_history, download_mark_index_history, download_funding_history, download_open_interest_history, download_spread_snapshots, download_liquidation_history (records unavailable), repair_missing_data, validate_data_quality, build_dataset_version.

Gate checks wired into the Gate Runner: DATA-COV (coverage + zero unfilled gaps + immutable snapshot + manifest + dataset_versions row) and DQ (one criterion per Section 23 check); both emit GateResult JSON matching configs/gate_result.schema.json.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Ingestion for OHLCV (all TFs), mark/index, funding, OI, spread snapshots; historical downloader + incremental updater
acceptance_criteria.evidence: src/data/ingest.py + src/data/source.py; download_* jobs; tests/test_data_gaps_backfill.py::test_incremental_update_fetches_only_the_tail; dataset has 8721 rows across 24 series (3 symbols x {ohlcv@1m/5m/1h, mark, index, funding, open_interest, spread}).

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Automatic gap detection + backfill (scripts/backfill); append-only, deduplicated, checksummed; versioned dataset snapshots
acceptance_criteria.evidence: src/data/gaps.py + src/data/backfill.py + scripts/backfill; src/data/store.py (append-only dedup + checksum), tests/test_data_store.py; src/data/snapshot.py deterministic immutable snapshot data_0001_3dce2575cf890334; tests/test_data_coverage_snapshot.py.

src/data/validation.py + DataPlatform.write_quality_report -> reports/data/quality_<ts>.json + data_quality_reports table (series_validated=24, critical=0); validate_data_quality job; DQ gate writes the report.
make -s run-gate GATE=DATA-COV FORMAT=json -> PASS (5/5 criteria); make -s run-gate GATE=DQ FORMAT=json -> PASS (11/11 criteria); tests/test_data_gates.py; persisted GateResult rows PASSED.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: New/changed code has tests; pytest, ruff, mypy green; coverage thresholds met on critical modules
acceptance_criteria.evidence: 79 passed (was 36); ruff check + format clean; mypy Success (45 source files). data/validation has direct unit tests; risk/execution/adaptation not yet introduced.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No forbidden shortcut; no live-mode default; no secrets committed (Appendix B.17 / Section 30)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Datasets are versioned (dataset_versions + manifest), not untracked loose files; no monolithic script; TRADING_MODE=PAPER default unchanged; data lake (var/) git-ignored and regenerable; no keys added.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All new runtime behavior is config-driven and versioned (Section 4)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: configs/data.yaml drives symbols/timeframes/series/window/thresholds; DATA_VERSION bumped to data_0001; reports link versions via Settings.versions().

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Completion Report filled; docs/decisions updated for assumptions

gates_run.note: upstream dependency of DATA-COV; still PASS

tests.pytest: 136 passed, 1 warning (full suite re-run 2026-06-17); the 7 Phase 2 data-platform test files below contribute 43 passing tests (re-verified in isolation: `pytest tests/test_data_*.py` -> 43 passed). Original Phase 2 hand-off was 79 passed; the count grew as Phases 3-4 landed on the integration branch.
tests.coverage_risk_exec_adaptation: n/a (modules not implemented until later phases); data/validation covered by tests/test_data_validation.py
tests.ruff: ok (uv run ruff check src/data tests/test_data_*.py -> All checks passed)
tests.mypy: ok (uv run mypy src/data -> Success: no issues found in 12 source files)

issues_addressed.issue: Commit and stage all Phase 2 implementation files and provide them in the diff.
issues_addressed.resolution: Confirmed all Phase 2 implementation files are committed and tracked in git (commit e717b98 `feat(phase-2): data platform`): src/data/schema.py, src/data/source.py, src/data/store.py, src/data/ingest.py, src/data/validation.py, src/data/snapshot.py, src/data/platform.py, scripts/backfill (plus src/data/config.py, src/data/coverage.py, src/data/gaps.py, src/data/backfill.py, src/data/__init__.py). Verified via `git ls-files src/data scripts/backfill`; all present in the diff.

issues_addressed.issue: Include all test files in the diff so test robustness/logic can be validated against tautological assertions.
issues_addressed.resolution: Confirmed all 7 Phase 2 test files are committed and tracked in git (commit e717b98): tests/test_data_schema_source.py, tests/test_data_store.py, tests/test_data_gaps_backfill.py, tests/test_data_validation.py, tests/test_data_coverage_snapshot.py, tests/test_data_jobs.py, tests/test_data_gates.py. Assertions are behavioural, not tautological (e.g. dedup ignores a conflicting re-write, checksum is content-sensitive, deterministic source is range-independent, OHLC low<=open/close<=high, half-open read ranges). All 43 re-run green.

assumptions_and_decisions: docs/decisions/0003-phase-2-data-platform-choices.md (offline deterministic source; Parquet store; fixed as_of window; DATA-COV safe gap repair; local clock-drift check with NTP at deploy; liquidation/order-book not required this phase).
known_gaps_risks: Phase 2 data source is the OFFLINE deterministic generator (no exchange access). The ccxt + native-SDK source is wired in a later phase behind the same DataSource interface; the platform, gaps/backfill, validation, snapshots and gates are venue-agnostic.

The Parquet data lake under var/ is git-ignored and regenerable from the source via safe gap repair; the relational dataset_versions row + immutable manifest are the committed provenance. Per-run reports/data/ and reports/gates/ dumps are git-ignored.
Clock-drift verification is local (wall vs monotonic); absolute NTP sync is enforced on the host at deploy and re-verified by the Phase 13 MON gate.
UNIV and META gates remain NOT_RUN (no check yet) and are delivered in Phase 3; downstream gates correctly report BLOCKED until their phases land.
next_step: Hand off to Reviewer Agent; do not begin Phase 3.
